title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 630.199 - Research involving persons civilly detained, sections applicable
text:
630.199.  Research involving persons civilly detained, sections applicable. — Sections 630.194, 630.196 and 630.198 shall apply to all proposed biomedical or pharmacological research that involves persons civilly detained.
(L. 1996 S.B. 884 & 841)
